meta_title: Las Vegas Case Study | Local Handyman
meta_description: Vegas bathrooms fool people. The city is dry, so they assume mold or repeated mildew must be a housekeeping issue

answer_summary: Vegas bathrooms fool people. The city is dry, so they assume mold or repeated mildew must be a housekeeping issue, when a lot of the time it’s trapped moisture, weak fan performance, sweating lines
